title: Calzone with Salsa
excerpt: Ingredients Calzone 125 g finely diced smoked chicken 65 ml cooked corn kernels 65 ml finely diced red pepper 45ml finely diced baby marrow 45 ml finely diced red onion 250 ml coarsely grated, strong cheese 15 ml dried Italian mixed herbs salt and coarsely ground black pepper to taste 500 g store-bought dough Salsa 250 …
html:
Ingredients

Calzone

  • 125 g finely diced smoked chicken
  • 65 ml cooked corn kernels
  • 65 ml finely diced red pepper
  • 45ml finely diced baby marrow
  • 45 ml finely diced red onion
  • 250 ml coarsely grated, strong cheese
  • 15 ml dried Italian mixed herbs salt and coarsely ground black pepper to taste
  • 500 g store-bought dough

Salsa

  • 250 ml finely diced tomatoes
  • 45 ml very finely chopped red onion
  • 10 ml dried oregano
  • 10 ml finely chopped garlic
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 10 ml plain white vinegar
  • 15 ml tomato puree
  • 10 ml sugar salt and pepper to taste

Method

For the calzone, mix all the ingredients together except the dough.

Roll the dough out into a circle and place it on a large, greased baking tray.

Spoon the filling onto one half of the dough circle.

Fold the other half of the dough over the filling and fold the edges of the dough over into a little roll.

Pinch the dough shut properly so the filling doesn't easily leak out.

Bake at 180°C for 20 – 30 minutes.

Meanwhile mix the salsa ingredients together and spoon into a serving bowl.

Serves 2 – 4 portions (depending on the course and appetite ☺) with the salsa.

Spice up the filling: add dried red chilli flakes to taste and also try store-bought BBQ sauce or basil pesto.

Easy!
